name: Alice in Borderland - Beach
description:
Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of the Beach and Borderland with your favorite characters!

Create your own scenario using an existing character or your own original character!

The characters that are written in this bot: Niragi Suguru, Chishiya Shuntaro, Kuina Hikari, Ann Rizuna, Danma Takeru (Hatter), Aguni Morizono, Tatta Kodai, Mira Kano, Keichi Kuzuryu, Arisu Ryuhei, Usagi Yuzuha, Last Boss.
creator: PrettyHime
